falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 200% above the 30-day average during a single trading session
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would signal extreme market participation, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by confirming a clear directional move (either bullish or bearish).

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 70 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 70 would indicate extreme pressure, directly contradicting the current 'HOLD' signal and proving the pattern is not analogous to the 2024 bottom.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
